modules.module_title: Rainwater Harvesting ka Parichay (Introduction to RWH)
RWH System ke Components (Components of RWH Systems)
Site Assessment aur Basic Design (Site Assessment and Basic Design)
Pani ki Quality aur Treatment (Water Quality and Treatment)
Safety aur Best Practices (Safety and Best Practices)

questions.question: Rainwater harvesting ka primary uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Electricity generate karna

questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting ka mukhya uddeshya baarish ke paani ko jama karke groundwater level ko badhana ya use directly use karna hai.

questions.question: Urban areas mein RWH kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Kyuki wahan zyada baarish hoti hai
options.B: Paani ki kami aur groundwater depletion ko address karne ke liye
options.C: Logon ko naya project dene ke liye
options.D: Building aesthetics improve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Urban areas mein paani ki demand zyada hoti hai aur groundwater level tezi se girta hai, isliye RWH paani ki kami aur groundwater depletion ko rokne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: RWH system kitne prakar ke hote hain?

options.B: Do mukhya prakar

questions.explanation: Mukhya do prakar ke RWH systems hote hain: 'Storage for direct use' aur 'Recharge to groundwater'.

questions.question: Direct use RWH system mein paani ko kahan store kiya jata hai?

options.B: Storage tank mein

questions.explanation: Direct use RWH system mein baarish ke paani ko baad mein use karne ke liye storage tank mein jama kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Groundwater recharge system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Nadiyon ko saaf karta hai

questions.explanation: Groundwater recharge system surface runoff ko kam karta hai aur paani ko zameen ke andar bhejdkar groundwater level ko badhata hai, jisse floods ka khatra bhi kam hota hai.

questions.question: Rooftop rainwater harvesting mein catchment area kya hota hai?

options.B: Chatt (roof)

questions.explanation: Rooftop RWH mein, chat (roof) woh surface hoti hai jahan se baarish ka paani jama kiya jata hai, use 'catchment area' kehte hain.

questions.question: RWH se kya environmental benefit milta hai?

options.A: Air conditioning ki zaroorat kam hoti hai
options.B: Stormwater runoff aur flood risk kam hota hai

questions.explanation: RWH stormwater runoff ko kam karke floods ke khatre ko kam karta hai, aur local water bodies par load bhi kam karta hai.

questions.question: RWH system lagane se kya economic fayda hota hai?

options.B: Municipal water bill kam hota hai
options.C: Gaadiyon ki maintenance cost kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Apna baarish ka paani use karne se municipal supply par dependance kam hoti hai, jisse paani ka bill kam hota hai.

questions.question: RWH system ka ek disadvantage kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Initial installation cost high ho sakti hai
options.B: Paani ki quality hamesha kharab hoti hai
options.C: System bahut zyada jagah leta hai

questions.explanation: RWH system ko install karne mein shuruati kharcha (initial installation cost) lag sakta hai, jo ek disadvantage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek RWH technician ki kya primary responsibility hoti hai?

options.B: RWH systems ko design, install aur maintain karna

questions.explanation: Ek RWH technician ka mukhya kaam RWH systems ki design, installation aur maintenance se sambandhit hota hai.

questions.question: RWH system mein collected water ko kis kaam ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Peene ke liye bina treatment ke
options.B: Gardening, toilet flushing aur car washing ke liye
options.D: Cooking ke liye bina treatment ke

questions.explanation: Collected rainwater ko non-potable uses jaise gardening, toilet flushing aur car washing ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar RWH system ko theek se maintain na kiya jaye, toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: System ki efficiency kam ho sakti hai aur paani contaminate ho sakta hai
options.B: Bijli ka bill badh jayega

questions.explanation: Poor maintenance se system ki efficiency kam ho sakti hai aur jama kiya gaya paani polluted ho sakta hai.

questions.question: RWH mein 'first flush' device ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Pehle baarish ke paani ko divert karna jismein impurities hoti hain

questions.explanation: First flush device pehli baarish ke paani ko divert karta hai, jo chat se dhool, pattiyaan aur anya impurities le kar aata hai, jisse stored paani saaf rehta hai.

questions.question: RWH system ke liye kaun sa material sabse zyada use hota hai catchment area ke liye?

options.B: Concrete ya tiled roofs

questions.explanation: Smooth, non-porous surfaces jaise concrete ya tiled roofs RWH ke liye ideal catchment area hote hain kyuki woh paani ko saaf rakhte hain.

questions.question: RWH system mein collected paani ko peene layak banane ke liye kya karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Usey boil karna ya proper treatment karna

questions.explanation: Peene layak banane ke liye, collected rainwater ko filtration ke alawa boiling ya proper chemical/UV treatment ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki sabhi pathogens nikal jayein.

questions.question: RWH system ke components mein se ek 'conduit' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Paani ko catchment se storage tak le jana

questions.explanation: Conduits, jaise ki gutters aur downpipes, catchment area se paani ko storage ya recharge structure tak le jaane ka kaam karte hain.

questions.question: Ek well-designed RWH system kitne saal tak chal sakta hai agar theek se maintain kiya jaye?

options.B: 5-10 saal

questions.explanation: Agar RWH system ko sahi tarike se install aur maintain kiya jaye, toh woh 15-20 saal ya usse bhi zyada chal sakta hai, components ki quality par nirbhar karta hai.

questions.question: Rooftop RWH system mein 'catchment surface' kya hoti hai?

options.A: Woh zameen jahan paani jama hota hai
options.B: Woh surface jahan se baarish ka paani ikattha kiya jata hai, jaise ki chat
options.C: Woh tanki jismein paani store hota hai
options.D: Woh pipe jisse paani nikalta hai

questions.explanation: Catchment surface woh area hai jahan se baarish ka paani jama kiya jata hai, rooftop RWH mein yeh aam taur par ghar ki chat hoti hai.

questions.question: Gutters ka kya kaam hota hai RWH system mein?

options.B: Chat se paani ko downpipes tak direct karna

questions.explanation: Gutters chat ke kinaron par lage hote hain aur baarish ke paani ko collect karke downpipes tak pahunchate hain.

questions.question: Downpipes ya conduits kis material ke banaye ja sakte hain?

options.B: PVC, HDPE, ya GI pipes

questions.explanation: Downpipes aam taur par PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride), HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene), ya GI (Galvanized Iron) jaise durable materials se banaye jate hain.

questions.question: 'First-flush device' ka dusra naam kya hai?

options.B: Rain separator

questions.explanation: First-flush device ko rain separator bhi kehte hain, kyuki yeh pehle baarish ke paani ko alag karta hai jismein impurities hoti hain.

questions.question: Mesh filter ya leaf screen kahan lagaya jata hai?

options.B: Downpipe ke top par ya first-flush ke baad

questions.explanation: Mesh filter ya leaf screen downpipe ke top par ya first-flush device ke baad lagaya jata hai taaki bade particles jaise pattiyaan aur kachra system mein na jayein.

questions.question: Storage tank ke liye kaun sa material sabse suitable hai?

options.B: Ferrocement, plastic (HDPE), ya RCC (Reinforced Cement Concrete)

questions.explanation: Storage tanks ke liye durable aur non-toxic materials jaise ferrocement, food-grade plastic (HDPE) ya RCC ka upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Groundwater recharge pit mein kis type ki filtering layers hoti hain?

options.B: Koyla, ret, bajri

questions.explanation: Recharge pits mein filtering layers ke liye aam taur par koyla (charcoal), ret (sand) aur bajri (gravel) ka upyog kiya jata hai taaki paani saaf ho kar zameen mein jaye.

questions.question: Agar RWH system mein paani ko zameen mein recharge karna hai, toh kis structure ka upyog kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Recharge pit ya borewell

questions.explanation: Groundwater recharge ke liye recharge pits, borewell recharge structures ya trenches ka upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Storage tank mein 'overflow pipe' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Extra paani ko nikalna jab tank bhar jaye

questions.explanation: Overflow pipe yeh ensure karta hai ki jab tank bhar jaye toh extra paani surakshit tarike se nikal jaye, jisse tank ko damage na ho.

questions.question: Pumps ka upyog RWH system mein kab zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Jab paani gravity se upar na pahunch paye
options.B: Hamesha zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Pumps ka upyog tab hota hai jab collected paani ko storage se upar ya door ke points tak pahunchana ho, jahan gravity flow possible na ho.

questions.question: Ek 'inspection chamber' RWH system mein kahan lagaya jata hai aur kyon?

options.A: Chat par, paani collect karne ke liye
options.B: Ground level par, pipes ko check aur clean karne ke liye
options.C: Tank ke andar, paani store karne ke liye
options.D: Pump ke paas, bijli supply ke liye

questions.explanation: Inspection chamber underground pipes aur connections ko check karne, blockage hatane aur maintenance karne ke liye banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Sedimentation tank ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Bade particles ko settle hone dena

questions.explanation: Sedimentation tank mein paani ko thodi der ke liye roka jata hai taaki suspended solids (bade particles) niche settle ho jayein.

questions.question: Agar RWH system mein paani filtration ke baad bhi cloudy ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Filter media sahi nahi hai ya clogged hai
options.B: Tank bahut chota hai
options.D: Baarish bahut zyada ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Agar paani filter hone ke baad bhi cloudy hai, toh iska matlab filter media theek se kaam nahi kar raha hai ya clogged ho gaya hai, jise clean ya replace karna padega.

questions.question: RWH system mein 'standpipe' ya 'wet system' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Pipes hamesha paani se bhare rehte hain
options.B: Pipes hamesha khali rehte hain
options.C: Pipes sirf baarish ke time paani se bharte hain
options.D: Pipes ko manually bharna padta hai

questions.explanation: Wet system mein, downpipes underground hote hain aur paani ko tank tak pahunchane ke liye hamesha paani se bhare rehte hain, jismein ek 'standpipe' jaisa effect hota hai.

questions.question: Dry RWH system mein downpipes ka kya hota hai jab baarish nahi hoti?

options.A: Woh paani se bhare rehte hain
options.B: Woh khali ho jate hain

questions.explanation: Dry RWH system mein, jab baarish nahi hoti, toh downpipes gravity ki madad se khali ho jate hain, jisse stagnant water aur contamination ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'submersible pump' ka kya fayda hai RWH system mein?

options.A: Woh surface par zyada jagah leta hai
options.B: Woh shant hota hai aur paani ke andar kaam karta hai
options.C: Usey baar-baar maintain karna padta hai
options.D: Usey bijli ki zaroorat nahi hoti

questions.explanation: Submersible pump paani ke andar kaam karta hai, isliye yeh shant hota hai aur surface par jagah nahi leta. Yeh efficient bhi hota hai.

questions.question: RWH system mein 'air gap' kyon provide kiya jata hai?

options.A: Paani ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.B: Backflow contamination se bachane ke liye
options.C: Tank ko zyada paani se bharne ke liye
options.D: Paani ko garam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Air gap ek physical separation hota hai RWH supply aur potable water supply ke beech, taaki collected rainwater potable supply ko contaminate na kare (backflow prevention).

questions.question: Site assessment mein sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Roof ka type, size aur condition

questions.explanation: Site assessment mein sabse pehle roof ka type (flat/sloping), size (catchment area) aur condition (saaf hai ya nahi, cracks hain?) check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Average annual rainfall data kyon zaroori hai RWH design ke liye?

options.A: Taki pata chale ki kitne din baarish hogi
options.B: Taki pata chale ki kitna paani collect kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Taki paani ka bill calculate kiya ja sake
options.D: Taki temperature predict kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Average annual rainfall data se yeh estimate lagaya jata hai ki ek saal mein kitna paani catchment area se collect kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Catchment area calculate karne ka formula kya hai?

options.B: Length x Width (flat roof ke liye)

questions.explanation: Ek flat roof ke liye, catchment area uski length aur width ko multiply karke nikala jata hai.

questions.question: Runoff coefficient kya darshata hai?

options.B: Catchment surface se kitna paani runoff hota hai

questions.explanation: Runoff coefficient ek factor hai jo batata hai ki baarish ka kitna percentage (bhag) catchment surface se collect kiya ja sakta hai, yeh surface type par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Ek smooth tiled roof ka runoff coefficient approximately kitna hota hai?
questions.explanation: Smooth aur non-porous surfaces jaise tiled roofs ka runoff coefficient zyada hota hai, aam taur par 0.7 se 0.9 tak.

questions.question: Storage tank ka size determine karne ke liye kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Annual rainfall, catchment area, aur paani ki daily demand
options.D: Market mein available sabse bada tank

questions.explanation: Tank ka size calculate karte samay annual rainfall, catchment area se collect hone wala paani, aur ghar ki daily paani ki zaroorat ko dhyan mein rakha jata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko 100 sq meter roof area se 500 mm annual rainfall mein paani collect karna hai (runoff coefficient 0.8), toh kitna paani collect hoga?

options.B: 80,000 liters

questions.explanation: Formula: Volume = Catchment Area (sq m) x Rainfall (m) x Runoff Coefficient. 100 sq m x 0.5 m x 0.8 = 40 cubic meters = 40,000 liters.

questions.question: Soil infiltration rate kis liye important hai groundwater recharge system design mein?

options.A: Tank ka material decide karne ke liye
options.B: Yeh pata lagane ke liye ki paani zameen mein kitni tezi se jayega
options.C: Pipe ka diameter decide karne ke liye
options.D: Roof ka type decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Soil infiltration rate batati hai ki mitti mein paani kitni tezi se absorb hota hai, jo recharge structure ke size aur type ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: RWH system design karte waqt 'slope' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Paani ko tezi se bahaane ke liye
options.B: Paani ko gravity se flow karwane ke liye
options.C: Paani ko store karne ke liye
options.D: Paani ko filter karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper slope gutters aur downpipes mein paani ko gravity ki madad se flow karwata hai, jisse pumping ki zaroorat kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Kisi site par RWH system design karte waqt 'landscaping' ka kya consideration hota hai?

options.B: Yeh dekhna ki ped-paudhe catchment area ko block na karein

questions.explanation: Landscaping, especially ped-paudhe, ko is tarah manage karna chahiye ki woh chat par pattiyaan ya kachra na girayein aur catchment area ko block na karein.

questions.question: RWH system design mein 'plumbing layout' kyon important hai?

options.B: Taki paani sahi jagah tak pahunche aur cross-contamination na ho

questions.explanation: Sahi plumbing layout se yeh ensure hota hai ki collected paani desired points tak pahunche aur potable water supply ke sath cross-contamination na ho.

questions.question: Agar site par borewell hai, toh RWH ke liye kya option ho sakta hai?

options.B: Usey recharge structure ke roop mein upyog karna

questions.explanation: Agar site par existing borewell hai, toh use filter kiye hue rainwater se recharge kiya ja sakta hai, jisse groundwater level badhega.

questions.question: RWH design mein 'cost-effectiveness' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek aisa system design karna jo budget mein ho aur efficient ho
options.C: Sabse sasta system choose karna, chahe woh efficient na ho

questions.explanation: Cost-effectiveness ka matlab hai ek aisa system design karna jo initial cost aur long-term benefits ko balance kare, yani efficient bhi ho aur budget mein bhi.

questions.question: Agar roof par zyada ped-paudhe hain, toh RWH design mein kya extra feature lagana padega?

options.B: Zyada effective leaf screens aur first-flush devices

questions.explanation: Ped-paudhon se pattiyaan aur kachra zyada aata hai, isliye zyada effective leaf screens aur first-flush devices ki zaroorat padegi.

questions.question: RWH system design mein 'safety' ka kya role hai?

options.B: System ki structural integrity aur users ki safety

questions.explanation: Design mein yeh ensure karna chahiye ki system structurally sound ho, aur koi bhi component (jaise tank, pipes) users ke liye khatarnak na ho.

questions.question: Rooftop RWH ke liye kaun sa roof material sabse kam suitable hai?

options.B: Tiled roofs

questions.explanation: Asbestos sheets स्वास्थ्य ke liye haanikarak hote hain aur unse collect kiya gaya paani use karna unsafe ho sakta hai, isliye yeh kam suitable hain.

questions.question: Ek RWH technician ko site assessment ke dauran kya documents check karne chahiye?

options.A: Building plans, rainfall data aur soil reports
options.B: Padosiyon ke electricity bill

questions.explanation: Building plans se roof area aur structure ka pata chalta hai, rainfall data se potential harvest, aur soil reports groundwater recharge ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: RWH system install karne se pehle, roof ki kya condition honi chahiye?

options.B: Saaf aur kachre se mukt honi chahiye

questions.explanation: Installation se pehle roof ko achhe se saaf karna zaroori hai taaki collected paani mein impurities kam ho.

questions.question: Gutters install karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unmein proper slope hona chahiye paani ke flow ke liye
options.D: Unhe sirf ek side lagana chahiye

questions.explanation: Gutters mein thoda sa slope hona chahiye, aam taur par 1:200 se 1:500, taaki paani downpipes ki taraf flow kare aur kahin jama na ho.

questions.question: Downpipes ko kahan attach karna chahiye?

options.B: Gutters se aur phir first-flush device/filter se

questions.explanation: Downpipes ko gutters se connect kiya jata hai aur phir woh paani ko first-flush device, filter aur ant mein storage tank ya recharge structure tak le jate hain.

questions.question: First-flush device install karte waqt kya critical point hai?

options.A: Uski height storage tank se zyada honi chahiye
options.B: Usey sahi jagah par lagana chahiye taaki pehla baarish ka paani divert ho sake

questions.explanation: First-flush device ko downpipe ke baad aur filter se pehle sahi jagah par lagana zaroori hai, taaki woh pehle dirty paani ko divert kar sake.

questions.question: Storage tank ko kahan install karna sabse achha hai?

options.B: Level surface par, strong foundation ke sath
options.C: Kahin bhi, bina kisi support ke

questions.explanation: Storage tank ko ek level aur strong foundation par install karna chahiye taaki woh paani ke wazan ko sah sake aur unstable na ho.

questions.question: RWH system mein filters ki maintenance kaise karni chahiye?

options.B: Regularly saaf karna aur zaroorat padne par replace karna

questions.explanation: Filters ko regularly check aur saaf karna chahiye, aur agar woh damage ho jayein ya bahut purane ho jayein toh replace kar dena chahiye taaki paani ki quality achhi rahe.

questions.question: Storage tank ki safai kitni baar karni chahiye?

options.B: Har 1-2 saal mein ek baar ya zaroorat padne par

questions.explanation: Storage tank ki safai har 1-2 saal mein ek baar ya jab usmein sediment (gaad) zyada jama ho jaye, tab karni chahiye.

questions.question: Gutters aur downpipes mein blockage kyon hota hai?

options.B: Pattiyaan, dhool aur kachre ke jama hone se
options.C: Pipe ke bahut bade hone se
options.D: Paani ke bahut saaf hone se

questions.explanation: Pattiyaan, dhool, kachra aur anya malba gutters aur downpipes mein jama hokar blockage paida kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar RWH system se badboo aa rahi hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Tank mein stagnant paani ya organic matter ka decomposition
options.B: Pipes bahut naye hain
options.C: Baarish bahut kam ho rahi hai
options.D: Pumps bahut achhe se kaam kar rahe hain

questions.explanation: Badboo aane ka matlab hai ki tank mein paani stagnant ho gaya hai ya organic matter (jaise pattiyaan) decompose ho raha hai, jise saaf karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Leakage ko kaise repair kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Cracks ko sealant ya waterproof material se fill karke

questions.explanation: Leaks ko repair karne ke liye cracks ya joints par sealant, epoxy ya waterproof coating lagani chahiye.

questions.question: Rooftop ko kitni baar saaf karna chahiye RWH system ke liye?

options.B: Baarish ke season se pehle aur zaroorat padne par

questions.explanation: Rooftop ko baarish ke season se pehle achhe se saaf karna chahiye aur agar zyada kachra ya pattiyaan jama ho jayein toh regularly saaf karte rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar pump kaam nahi kar raha hai, toh pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Bijli supply aur connection check karna

questions.explanation: Pump ke kaam na karne par, sabse pehle uski bijli supply, fuse aur electrical connections ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Recharge pit ki maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Filter layers ko saaf karna ya replace karna

questions.explanation: Recharge pit ki maintenance mein filter layers (sand, gravel, charcoal) ko saaf karna ya replace karna shamil hai, kyuki woh time ke sath clogged ho sakte hain.

questions.question: RWH system ko winterization ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.B: Jab freezing temperatures ki sambhavna ho

questions.explanation: Freezing temperatures wale areas mein, pipes aur components ko freeze hone se bachane ke liye winterization (jaise paani drain karna, insulation) zaroori hai.

questions.question: RWH system ke components ko kitni baar inspect karna chahiye?

options.B: Har 3-6 mahine mein

questions.explanation: Regular inspection (har 3-6 mahine mein) se chhoti problems ko bada hone se roka ja sakta hai aur system ki efficiency bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar RWH system mein paani ka pressure kam ho raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Pipes mein blockage, pump ki working aur filters ki cleanliness

questions.explanation: Kam pressure ke liye pipes mein blockage, pump ki efficiency aur filters ka clogged hona mukhya karan ho sakte hain.

questions.question: RWH system ke liye 'preventive maintenance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jab system toot jaye tab repair karna
options.B: Regular checks aur safai karke problems ko hone se pehle rokna

questions.explanation: Preventive maintenance ka matlab hai regular inspections, cleaning aur minor repairs karke bade breakdowns aur problems ko hone se rokna.

questions.question: Rainwater mein kaun se common contaminants ho sakte hain?

options.B: Dhool, pattiyaan, bird droppings aur air pollutants

questions.explanation: Rainwater mein dhool, pattiyaan, bird droppings aur atmosphere se air pollutants mil sakte hain.

questions.question: Pani ki turbidity kya darshati hai?

options.B: Pani mein suspended particles ki matra

questions.explanation: Turbidity pani mein ghule hue ya suspended particles ki matra ko darshati hai, jisse pani cloudy dikhta hai.

questions.question: pH level test kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Pani ki acidity ya alkalinity janne ke liye

questions.explanation: pH level pani ki acidity (pH < 7) ya alkalinity (pH > 7) ko batata hai, jo pipes aur fixtures par corrosion ko affect kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Bacteriological contamination check karne ke liye kaun sa test kiya jata hai?

options.B: E. coli ya Coliform bacteria test

questions.explanation: E. coli ya total coliform bacteria ki presence peene layak paani mein faecal contamination ka indication deti hai, isliye yeh test zaroori hai.

questions.question: Simple filtration ke liye kaun se materials ka upyog hota hai?

options.B: Ret, bajri aur charcoal

questions.explanation: Sand (ret), gravel (bajri) aur charcoal (koyla) common filter media hain jo physically impurities ko remove karte hain aur organic matter ko absorb karte hain.

questions.question: Agar paani peene ke liye use karna hai, toh filtration ke baad kya additional treatment zaroori hai?

options.B: Disinfection jaise boiling, chlorination ya UV treatment

questions.explanation: Peene ke liye paani ko filtration ke baad disinfect karna zaroori hai, taaki sabhi haanikarak microorganisms (bacteria, viruses) mar jayein. Iske liye boiling, chlorination ya UV purification ka upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Chlorination kya hai?

options.B: Pani mein chlorine milakar microorganisms ko marna

questions.explanation: Chlorination ek chemical disinfection method hai jismein paani mein chlorine ya chlorine compounds milakar bacteria aur viruses ko mara jata hai.

questions.question: UV (Ultraviolet) disinfection kaise kaam karta hai?

options.B: UV light se microorganisms ke DNA ko damage karke

questions.explanation: UV disinfection mein ultraviolet light ka upyog kiya jata hai jo microorganisms ke DNA ko damage kar deta hai, jisse woh reproduce nahi kar pate aur mar jate hain.

questions.question: Activated charcoal filter ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf bade particles remove karta hai
options.B: Badboo, rang aur kuch chemicals ko absorb karta hai

questions.explanation: Activated charcoal (sakriya koyla) apni adsorptive properties ki wajah se paani se badboo, rang aur kuch organic chemicals ko remove karta hai.

questions.question: Water testing kit ka upyog kyon kiya jata hai?

options.A: Paani ka wazan janne ke liye
options.B: Paani ki quality parameters jaise pH, turbidity, chlorine, etc. check karne ke liye
options.C: Paani ki height janne ke liye
options.D: Paani ka flow rate janne ke liye

questions.explanation: Water testing kits se paani ki quality ke alag-alag parameters jaise pH, turbidity, chlorine residual, aur bacteria ki presence ko check kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar collected rainwater mein heavy metals ka contamination ho, toh kaun sa treatment method effective ho sakta hai?

options.B: Reverse Osmosis (RO) ya ion exchange

questions.explanation: Heavy metals jaise contaminants ko remove karne ke liye RO ya ion exchange jaise advanced filtration methods ki zaroorat pad sakti hai, simple filtration aur disinfection effective nahi hote.

questions.question: Pani mein 'hardness' kya hoti hai?

options.B: Pani mein dissolved minerals jaise calcium aur magnesium ki matra

questions.explanation: Pani ki hardness usmein dissolved calcium aur magnesium ions ki matra ko darshati hai, jo scale formation aur soap consumption ko affect kar sakti hai.

questions.question: RWH system se milne wale paani ko non-potable uses ke liye treat karna kyon aasan hai?

options.A: Kyuki usmein bilkul bhi impurities nahi hoti
options.B: Kyuki uske liye sirf basic filtration ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Non-potable uses (jaise gardening, toilet flushing) ke liye paani ko peene layak banane jitni high quality ki zaroorat nahi hoti, isliye basic filtration kafi hota hai.

questions.question: Agar paani mein algae growth dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Tank ko saaf karna aur direct sunlight se bachana

questions.explanation: Algae growth ko rokne ke liye tank ko saaf karna aur usmein direct sunlight ko rokna zaroori hai, kyuki algae sunlight mein grow karte hain.

questions.question: Pani ki quality maintain karne ke liye 'first flush' device ka kya yogdaan hai?

options.A: Yeh pani ko garam karta hai
options.B: Yeh shuruati gande pani ko hata kar store kiye jane wale pani ki quality improve karta hai
options.C: Yeh pani ko thanda karta hai
options.D: Yeh pani ko pump karta hai

questions.explanation: First flush device pehli baarish ke paani ko divert karta hai, jismein chat se dhool, pattiyaan aur anya impurities hoti hain, jisse stored paani saaf rehta hai.

questions.question: RWH system mein paani ki quality ko regularly monitor karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki pata chale ki system theek se kaam kar raha hai aur paani safe hai
options.B: Taki paani ka bill kam ho
options.D: Taki paani ka level check kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Regular monitoring se yeh ensure hota hai ki system efficient hai aur collected paani intended use ke liye safe hai.

questions.question: RWH installation ke dauran kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna zaroori hai?

options.B: Safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes aur high-visibility jacket

questions.explanation: PPE jaise safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes aur high-visibility jacket workers ko chot se bachane ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Heights par kaam karte waqt kya safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Bina kisi support ke kaam karna
options.B: Safety harness aur stable ladder/scaffolding ka upyog karna

questions.explanation: Heights par kaam karte waqt girne se bachne ke liye safety harness aur stable, secure ladders ya scaffolding ka upyog karna chahiye.

questions.question: Electrical pumps aur wiring ke sath kaam karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unhe waterproof aur properly earthed hona chahiye
options.C: Unhone hamesha khula chhod dena chahiye
options.D: Unhone plastic se cover karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Electrical pumps aur wiring ko waterproof hona chahiye aur sahi tarike se earthed hona chahiye taaki electric shock ka khatra na ho.

questions.question: Confined spaces (jaise bade underground tanks) mein entry se pehle kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Oxygen level aur toxic gases ki presence

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein oxygen ki kami ya toxic gases ho sakti hain, isliye entry se pehle air quality ko test karna aur proper ventilation provide karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: RWH system install karte waqt surrounding area ko clean kyon rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Taki accidents se bacha ja sake aur contamination kam ho
options.D: Taki paani ka flow tez ho

questions.explanation: Worksite ko clean aur tidy rakhne se tripping hazards kam hote hain aur construction debris se paani ka contamination bhi kam hota hai.

questions.question: RWH system ke components ko properly label karna kyon important hai?

options.B: Taki maintenance aur operation mein asani ho, aur confusion na ho
options.C: Taki unhe koi chura na le
options.D: Taki unhe koi kharab na kare

questions.explanation: Components jaise valves, filters, pumps ko label karne se users aur technicians ko system ko operate aur maintain karne mein asani hoti hai.

questions.question: RWH system ke paani ko potable supply se alag rakhne ke liye kya best practice hai?

options.B: Separate plumbing lines aur backflow prevention devices use karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye rainwater supply aur potable water supply ke liye alag plumbing lines honi chahiye, aur backflow prevention devices (jaise air gap) lagane chahiye.

questions.question: RWH system ke liye kya local regulations aur permissions check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Haan, taki legal issues se bacha ja sake

questions.explanation: Kuch areas mein RWH system install karne ke liye permissions ya specific guidelines hoti hain, jinhe follow karna legal issues se bachne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: RWH system ke 'user manual' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Users ko system ke operation aur maintenance ke bare mein guide karna

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive user manual users ko system ko sahi tarike se operate aur maintain karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: RWH system mein chemical treatment use karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Chemicals ko safe tarike se store karna aur proper PPE use karna
options.C: Chemicals ko paani mein direct dalna

questions.explanation: Chemicals ko hamesha instructions ke anusar use karna chahiye, safe jagah par store karna chahiye aur proper PPE (gloves, eye protection) pehenna chahiye.

questions.question: RWH system ki efficiency badhane ke liye kya best practice hai?

options.B: Regular maintenance aur monitoring karna

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance, cleaning aur performance monitoring se system ki efficiency ko banaye rakha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar RWH system se paani waste ho raha hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Leaks check karna aur overflow management ko optimize karna
options.D: Paani ka upyog band kar dena

questions.explanation: Leaks ko repair karna aur overflow ko recharge ya alternate uses ke liye direct karna paani ki wastage ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: RWH system installation ke baad 'commissioning' process mein kya hota hai?

options.B: System ki testing, performance verification aur user training

questions.explanation: Commissioning mein system ki thorough testing ki jati hai ki woh design parameters ke anusar kaam kar raha hai ya nahi, aur users ko uske operation aur maintenance ki training di jati hai.

questions.question: RWH technicians ke liye 'continuous learning' kyon important hai?

options.A: Kyuki unhe naye tools kharidne hote hain
options.B: Naye technologies aur best practices se update rehne ke liye
options.C: Kyuki unhe exams pas karne hote hain

questions.explanation: RWH sector mein naye technologies aur methods aate rehte hain, isliye technicians ko continuous learning ke through update rehna chahiye.

questions.question: RWH system ke liye 'environmental impact assessment' kyon zaroori ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf bade industrial projects ke liye
options.B: Jab system se surrounding environment par significant impact ho sakta ho

questions.explanation: Bade RWH projects ke liye environmental impact assessment zaroori ho sakta hai taaki yeh ensure kiya ja sake ki system local ecosystem ya water table par negative impact na dale.

questions.question: Ek RWH technician ko customer ke sath kaise interact karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf technical terms mein baat karni chahiye
options.B: Respectfully, clear aur concise information provide karni chahiye
options.C: Customer ko sab kuch khud karne ko kehna chahiye
options.D: Customer ki baat nahi sunni chahiye

questions.explanation: Customer satisfaction ke liye, technicians ko respectfully, clear aur understandable language mein information provide karni chahiye, aur unki queries ko patiently address karna chahiye.
